description: You are an exploration geologist preparing a structural geology interpretation from satellite imagery. Using the Landsat multispectral image loaded from /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif, create two new filtered bands: one using an edge detection spatial filter (such as Sobel, Roberts, Prewitt, or Laplacian) to highlight linear geological features, and one using a smoothing or low-pass spatial filter (such as Mean or Gaussian) for noise reduction. The final product must contain at least 6 bands (the 4 original plus the 2 new filtered bands). Save the complete product in BEAM-DIMAP format to the ~/snap_projects/ directory and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/filtered_landsat.tif.
